subtasks.description: Retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value, vendor name, and contract ID from MongoDB
Query invoices issued in 2024 by vendor/contract, summing total invoice amounts to get actual annual billed value

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against actual 2024 invoice totals from SQL, calculate variance percentage, identify and flag contracts with >10% variance, and generate a summary report with contract ID, vendor, contracted value, actual billed, variance %, and variance flag

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) mongo_query to fetch active contracts from contract store (small tier—straightforward collection scan with filters), (2) sql_gen to aggregate 2024 invoices by vendor/contract (small tier—basic GROUP BY with date filter), (3) cross_recon at mid tier to reconcile two sources, calculate variance percentages, apply the >10% threshold logic, classify variance significance, and produce the flagged report. The mid tier on cross_recon is justified because it involves multi-signal reconciliation (comparing two numeric sources), conditional flagging logic, and generating a synthesized output that requires inference about materiality. This avoids unnecessary complexity while ensuring accurate variance calculation and interpretation.

output.sql: SELECT iv.vendor_name, iv.contract_id, COUNT(iv.invoice_id) as invoice_count, SUM(iv.amount_usd) as total_invoiced_2024, SUM(iv.amount_usd) as actual_annual_billed_value FROM invoice_facts iv WHERE iv.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND iv.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY iv.vendor_name, iv.contract_id ORDER BY iv.vendor_name, iv.contract_id
